languages.text: В течение 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}раунда{/g} контратака этого аугмента срабатывает каждый раз, когда по обладателю аугмента {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}попадают{/g}. По окончании этого эффекта обладатель аугмента получает {g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}ошеломление{/g} до конца боя.

traits.locale_text: В течение 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}раунда{/g} контратака этого аугмента срабатывает каждый раз, когда по обладателю аугмента {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}попадают{/g}. languages.text: Durante 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}asalto{/g}, el contraataque de este aumento se activa cada vez que el usuario recibe un {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}impacto{/g}. Cuando este efecto termine, el usuario queda {g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}desequilibrado{/g} hasta el final del combate.
languages.original_text: For 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}, this augment's counter-attack triggers whenever the user is {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}hit{/g}. At the end of this effect, the user becomes {g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}staggered{/g} until the end of combat.

traits.locale_text: Durante 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}asalto{/g}, el contraataque de este aumento se activa cada vez que el usuario recibe un {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}impacto{/g}. Cuando este efecto termine, el usuario queda {g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}desequilibrado{/g} hasta el final del combate.

languages.text: 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}Runde{/g} lang wird der Gegenangriff dieser Augmentation ausgelöst, wenn der Nutzer einen {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}Treffer{/g} erleidet. Nach dem Ende dieses Effektes wird der Nutzer bis zum Ende des Kampfes mit {g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}Taumelnd{/g} belegt.

languages.text: 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}rauntluğuna{/g}, ne zaman kullanıcısına {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}vurulsa{/g} bu ogmentin karşı saldırısı tetiklenir. Kullanıcı, bu etki sona erdiğinde {g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}afallar{/g}. Afallama etkisi, çatışma sonuna dek sürer.
languages.original_text: For 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}, this augment's counter-attack triggers whenever the user is {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}hit{/g}. At the end of this effect, the user becomes {g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}staggered{/g} until the end of combat.

traits.locale_text: 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}rauntluğuna{/g}, ne zaman kullanıcısına {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}vurulsa{/g} bu ogmentin karşı saldırısı tetiklenir. Kullanıcı, bu etki sona erdiğinde {g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}afallar{/g}. Afallama etkisi, çatışma sonuna dek sürer.

languages.text: Pendant 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}, la contre-attaque de cette augmentation se déclenche chaque fois que l'utilisateur est {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}touché{/g}. Lorsque l'effet prend fin, l'utilisateur subit l'effet {g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}Sidération{/g} jusqu'à la fin du combat.

traits.locale_text: Pendant 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}, la contre-attaque de cette augmentation se déclenche chaque fois que l'utilisateur est {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}touché{/g}. languages.text: 1{g|Encyclopedia:Round}轮{/g}内，每当使用者被{g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}击中{/g}，触发此植入物的反击。该效果结束时，使用者陷入{g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}恐慌{/g}状态，直到战斗结束。
languages.original_text: For 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}, this augment's counter-attack triggers whenever the user is {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}hit{/g}. At the end of this effect, the user becomes {g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}staggered{/g} until the end of combat.

languages.text: 1{g|Encyclopedia:Round}ラウンド{/g}の間、このオーグメティックの反撃は使用者が{g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}命中{/g}されるたびに発動する。この効果の終了時、使用者は戦闘終了まで{g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}よろめき{/g}状態になる。
